The 32-bit Electron launcher has Qt5 in-process + Chromium runtime + bypass_time.txt (30-byte file that disables the server-side time-limit check). The EOS overlay launch entitlement is the re-eos-bypass skill target (in scope this cycle, override-scope audit trail).
